docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,534.00 FILED BY PREFERED BUILDING SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CLUB 1015 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLUB 1015

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PREFERED BUILDING SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLUB 1015 $1,534.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,549.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CLUB 1015 HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-16-1993, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PREFERED BUILDING SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CLUB 1015 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
